etymology.description: 旅(旅) (lǚ, "trip") refers to a journey or expedition. 行(行) (xíng, "to go; to walk") involves the action of moving or proceeding. Together, 旅行(旅行) (lǚxíng) literally means "to go on a trip," corresponding directly to the meaning "to travel."

parts.english: to go; to walk; behavior; conduct

examples.chinese: 我喜欢旅行(我喜歡旅行)。
我们计划下个月去旅行(我們計劃下個月去旅行)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen jìhuà xià gè yuè qù lǚxíng.
examples.english: We are planning to travel next month.

examples.chinese: 他想去欧洲旅行(他想去歐洲旅行)，体验不同的文化(體驗不同的文化)。
examples.pinyin: Tā xiǎng qù Ōuzhōu lǚxíng, tǐyàn bùtóng de wénhuà.
examples.english: He wants to travel to Europe to experience different cultures.
